options.content:
**Provider Workspace**  
[Summary](/d/patient-360-overview/patient-360-summary) | [Meds & Allergies](/d/patient-360-medications/patient-360-meds-and-allergies) | [Labs & Vitals](/d/patient-360-labs-vitals/patient-360-labs-and-vitals) | [Problems](/d/patient-360-problems/patient-360-problems) | [Timeline](/d/patient-360-timeline/patient-360-timeline)  
Paste a `golden_id` in the field above to load a patient-focused view.

targets.rawSql: select p.golden_id as "Golden ID", string_agg(distinct trim(concat_ws(' ', p.first_name, p.last_name)), ' | ' order by trim(concat_ws(' ', p.first_name, p.last_name))) as "Patient Name(s)", min(p.birth_date)::date as "Birth Date", max(date_part('year', age(p.birth_date)))::int as "Age", max(p.gender) as "Gender", string_agg(distinct p.zip_code, ', ' order by p.zip_code) as "ZIP Codes", string_agg(distinct p.source_system, ', ' order by p.source_system) as "Source Systems", count(distinct p.id) as "Linked Records", coalesce((select rr.readmission_risk from analytics.readmission_risk rr where rr.golden_id = p.golden_id limit 1), 'low') as "Readmission Risk", max(e.start_date)::date as "Last Visit Date" from patients p left join encounters e on e.patient_id = p.id where p.golden_id = '${golden_id}' group by p.golden_id;

with blood_type as (
    select
        coalesce(
            nullif(o.value_text, ''),
            trim(concat(coalesce(o.value_numeric::text, ''), ' ', coalesce(o.value_unit, '')))
        ) as blood_type,
        coalesce(o.effective_at, o.issued_at) as observed_at
    from observations o
    join patients p on p.id = o.patient_id
    where p.golden_id = '${golden_id}'
      and (
        coalesce(o.description, '') ~* '(blood group|blood type|rhesus)'
        or coalesce(o.code, '') ~* '(ABO|RH)'
      )
    order by coalesce(o.effective_at, o.issued_at) desc nulls last
    limit 1
),
allergy_rollup as (
    select
        count(*) as active_allergy_count,
        count(*) filter (where lower(coalesce(a.description, a.code, '')) ~* 'penicillin') as penicillin_allergy_count,
        string_agg(distinct coalesce(a.description, a.code), '; ' order by coalesce(a.description, a.code)) as allergy_summary
    from allergies a
    join patients p on p.id = a.patient_id
    where p.golden_id = '${golden_id}'
      and coalesce(a.clinical_status, 'active') = 'active'
),
med_rollup as (
    select count(distinct nullif(trim(coalesce(m.description, m.code)), '')) as current_med_count
    from medications m
    join patients p on p.id = m.patient_id
    where p.golden_id = '${golden_id}'
      and nullif(trim(coalesce(m.description, m.code)), '') is not null
      and (
        coalesce(m.status, 'active') not in ('stopped', 'cancelled', 'entered-in-error')
        or m.stop_date is null
        or m.stop_date >= current_date
      )
),
recent_encounter as (
    select
        e.start_date::date as last_encounter_date,
        coalesce(e.provider, 'Unknown') as last_provider,
        coalesce(e.encounter_type, 'Encounter') as last_encounter_type
    from encounters e
    join patients p on p.id = e.patient_id
    where p.golden_id = '${golden_id}'
    order by e.start_date desc nulls last
    limit 1
),
safety_rollup as (
    with active_meds as (
        select distinct lower(nullif(trim(coalesce(m.description, m.code)), '')) as med_name
        from medications m
        join patients p on p.id = m.patient_id
        where p.golden_id = '${golden_id}'
          and nullif(trim(coalesce(m.description, m.code)), '') is not null
          and (
            coalesce(m.status, 'active') not in ('stopped', 'cancelled', 'entered-in-error')
            or m.stop_date is null
            or m.stop_date >= current_date
          )
    ),
    active_allergies as (
        select distinct lower(coalesce(a.description, a.code)) as allergy_name
        from allergies a
        join patients p on p.id = a.patient_id
        where p.golden_id = '${golden_id}'
          and coalesce(a.clinical_status, 'active') = 'active'
    ),
    med_pairs as (
        select m1.med_name as left_med, m2.med_name as right_med
        from active_meds m1
        join active_meds m2 on m1.med_name < m2.med_name
    )
    select
        (
            select count(*)
            from med_pairs
            where (left_med ~* '\mwarfarin\M' and right_med ~* '(aspirin|clopidogrel|ibuprofen|naproxen)')
               or (right_med ~* '\mwarfarin\M' and left_med ~* '(aspirin|clopidogrel|ibuprofen|naproxen)')
        )
        +
        (
            select count(*)
            from med_pairs
            where left_med ~* '(fentanyl|tramadol|hydrocodone|oxycodone|codeine|morphine)'
              and right_med ~* '(fentanyl|tramadol|hydrocodone|oxycodone|codeine|morphine)'
        )
        +
        (
            select count(*)
            from med_pairs
            where left_med ~* '(simvastatin|atorvastatin|rosuvastatin|pravastatin|lovastatin)'
              and right_med ~* '(simvastatin|atorvastatin|rosuvastatin|pravastatin|lovastatin)'
        )
        +
        (
            select count(*)
            from med_pairs
            where left_med ~* '(albuterol|ventolin|proair|proventil)'
              and right_med ~* '(albuterol|ventolin|proair|proventil)'
        )
        +
        (
            select count(*)
            from active_allergies a
            join active_meds m on true
            where a.allergy_name ~* 'penicillin'
              and m.med_name ~* '(penicillin|amoxicillin|ampicillin|dicloxacillin|clavulanate)'
        ) as high_alert_count
),
acute_summary as (
    select *
    from provider_acute_care_summary
    where golden_id = '${golden_id}'
)
select
    coalesce((select blood_type from blood_type), 'Not documented in connected sources') as "Blood Type",
    coalesce((select allergy_summary from allergy_rollup), 'None documented') as "Allergy Summary",
    case when coalesce((select penicillin_allergy_count from allergy_rollup), 0) > 0 then 'Yes' else 'No' end as "Penicillin Allergy",
    coalesce((select active_allergy_count from allergy_rollup), 0) as "Active Allergies",
    coalesce((select current_med_count from med_rollup), 0) as "Current Meds",
    coalesce((select high_alert_count from safety_rollup), 0) as "High Safety Alerts",
    coalesce((select acute_visits_90d from acute_summary), 0) as "Acute Visits (90d)",
    coalesce((select ed_visits_90d from acute_summary), 0) as "ED Visits (90d)",
    (select last_encounter_date from recent_encounter) as "Last Encounter",
    coalesce((select last_provider from recent_encounter), 'Unknown') as "Last Provider",
    coalesce((select last_encounter_type from recent_encounter), 'No encounter documented') as "Last Encounter Type";
select case coalesce((select readmission_risk from analytics.readmission_risk where golden_id = '${golden_id}' limit 1), 'low') when 'high' then 3 when 'medium' then 2 else 1 end as risk_level;
select coalesce((current_date - max(e.start_date::date)), 0) as days_since_visit from encounters e join patients p on p.id = e.patient_id where p.golden_id = '${golden_id}';
select count(distinct e.id) as visits_12m from encounters e join patients p on p.id = e.patient_id where p.golden_id = '${golden_id}' and e.start_date >= now() - interval '12 months';

select count(distinct nullif(trim(coalesce(m.description, m.code)), '')) as current_med_count
from medications m
join patients p on p.id = m.patient_id
where p.golden_id = '${golden_id}'
  and nullif(trim(coalesce(m.description, m.code)), '') is not null
  and (
    coalesce(m.status, 'active') not in ('stopped', 'cancelled', 'entered-in-error')
    or m.stop_date is null
    or m.stop_date >= current_date
  );

with problem_rollup as (
    select c.description as problem, max(c.onset_date) as last_seen
    from conditions c
    join patients p on p.id = c.patient_id
    where p.golden_id = '${golden_id}'
      and c.description is not null
      and c.description !~* '(medication review due|full-time employment|part-time employment|not in labor force|employment status|social isolation|limited social contact|received higher education|educated to high school level|has a criminal record)'
    group by c.description
)
select count(*) from problem_rollup where last_seen >= current_date - interval '24 months';
select coalesce((select acute_visits_90d from provider_acute_care_summary where golden_id = '${golden_id}'), 0) as acute_visits_90d;

with data as (
select severity as "Severity", domain as "Domain", care_gap as "Care Gap", evidence as "Evidence", suggested_action as "Suggested Action", due_window as "Due"
from provider_care_gaps
where golden_id = '${golden_id}'
order by sort_order, care_gap
limit 12
)
select * from data
union all
select 'Low', 'Stable', 'No immediate care gaps identified', NULL, NULL, NULL
where not exists (select 1 from data);

with data as (
with problem_rollup as (
    select
        c.description as "Problem",
        case
            when c.description ilike '%diabet%' or c.description ilike '%glucose%' or c.description ilike '%obesity%' then 'Metabolic'
            when c.description ilike '%hypertension%' or c.description ilike '%hyperlip%' or c.description ilike '%cholesterol%' or c.description ilike '%card%' then 'Cardiovascular'
            when c.description ilike '%bronch%' or c.description ilike '%asthma%' or c.description ilike '%copd%' or c.description ilike '%sinus%' or c.description ilike '%pharyngitis%' then 'Pulmonary/ENT'
            when c.description ilike '%pain%' or c.description ilike '%arthritis%' or c.description ilike '%musculoskeletal%' or c.description ilike '%back%' then 'MSK/Pain'
            when c.description ilike '%anemia%' or c.description ilike '%renal%' or c.description ilike '%kidney%' or c.description ilike '%dialysis%' then 'Renal/Heme'
            when c.description ilike '%alcohol%' or c.description ilike '%tobacco%' or c.description ilike '%depress%' or c.description ilike '%anxiety%' or c.description ilike '%dementia%' or c.description ilike '%abuse%' or c.description ilike '%violence%' then 'Behavioral/Psychosocial'
            else 'General Medicine'
        end as "Focus",
        case
            when c.description ilike '%diabet%' or c.description ilike '%prediabet%' then 'Review glycemic control and medication plan.'
            when c.description ilike '%hypertension%' then 'Check blood pressure trend and antihypertensive adherence.'
            when c.description ilike '%hyperlip%' or c.description ilike '%cholesterol%' then 'Review lipid control and statin therapy.'
            when c.description ilike '%anemia%' then 'Trend CBC and evaluate symptoms.'
            when c.description ilike '%pain%' then 'Assess pain control, function, and medication burden.'
            when c.description ilike '%dementia%' then 'Confirm caregiver support and safety planning.'
            when c.description ilike '%abuse%' or c.description ilike '%violence%' then 'Assess safety and support needs.'
            else 'Review with recent vitals, labs, and treatment plan.'
        end as "Suggested Follow-up",
        max(c.onset_date)::date as "Last Seen",
        count(*) as "Occurrences",
        case when max(c.onset_date) >= current_date - interval '24 months' then 'Active' else 'Historical' end as "Status"
    from conditions c
    join patients p on p.id = c.patient_id
    where p.golden_id = '${golden_id}'
      and c.description is not null
      and c.description !~* '(medication review due|full-time employment|part-time employment|not in labor force|employment status|social isolation|limited social contact|received higher education|educated to high school level|has a criminal record)'
    group by c.description
)
select * from problem_rollup
where "Status" = 'Active'
order by
    case "Focus" when 'Metabolic' then 0 when 'Cardiovascular' then 1 when 'Renal/Heme' then 2 else 3 end,
    "Last Seen" desc nulls last,
    "Occurrences" desc,
    "Problem"
limit 20
)
select * from data
union all
select 'No active clinical problems', NULL, NULL, NULL::date, NULL::bigint, NULL
where not exists (select 1 from data);

with data as (
with latest_labs as (
    select distinct on (coalesce(o.description, o.code))
        o.effective_at::date as "Collected",
        coalesce(o.description, o.code) as "Lab",
        coalesce(nullif(o.value_text, ''), trim(concat(coalesce(o.value_numeric::text, ''), ' ', coalesce(o.value_unit, '')))) as "Result",
        case
            when coalesce(o.description, o.code) ilike 'Hemoglobin A1c%' and coalesce(o.value_numeric, 0) >= 8 then 'High'
            when coalesce(o.description, o.code) ilike 'Hemoglobin A1c%' and coalesce(o.value_numeric, 0) >= 6.5 then 'Borderline'
            when coalesce(o.description, o.code) ilike 'Cholesterol in LDL%' and coalesce(o.value_numeric, 0) >= 160 then 'High'
            when coalesce(o.description, o.code) ilike 'Cholesterol in LDL%' and coalesce(o.value_numeric, 0) >= 130 then 'Borderline'
            when coalesce(o.description, o.code) ilike 'Glomerular filtration rate%' and coalesce(o.value_numeric, 999) < 30 then 'Critical'
            when coalesce(o.description, o.code) ilike 'Glomerular filtration rate%' and coalesce(o.value_numeric, 999) < 60 then 'High'
            when coalesce(o.description, o.code) ilike 'Creatinine%' and coalesce(o.value_numeric, 0) >= 1.5 then 'High'
            when coalesce(o.description, o.code) ilike 'Glucose%' and coalesce(o.value_numeric, 0) >= 200 then 'High'
            when coalesce(o.description, o.code) ilike 'Hemoglobin%' and coalesce(o.value_numeric, 999) < 10 then 'High'
            when coalesce(o.description, o.code) ilike 'Potassium%' and (coalesce(o.value_numeric, 4.0) < 3.5 or coalesce(o.value_numeric, 4.0) > 5.3) then 'High'
            when coalesce(o.description, o.code) ilike 'Sodium%' and (coalesce(o.value_numeric, 140.0) < 130 or coalesce(o.value_numeric, 140.0) > 150) then 'High'
            else 'Normal'
        end as "Flag",
        case
            when coalesce(o.description, o.code) ilike 'Hemoglobin A1c%' then 'Diabetes control'
            when coalesce(o.description, o.code) ilike 'Cholesterol in LDL%' then 'Cardiovascular risk'
            when coalesce(o.description, o.code) ilike 'Glomerular filtration rate%' or coalesce(o.description, o.code) ilike 'Creatinine%' then 'Renal function'
            when coalesce(o.description, o.code) ilike 'Glucose%' then 'Metabolic status'
            when coalesce(o.description, o.code) ilike 'Hemoglobin%' then 'Anemia screening'
            when coalesce(o.description, o.code) ilike 'Potassium%' or coalesce(o.description, o.code) ilike 'Sodium%' then 'Electrolytes'
            else 'Clinical review'
        end as "Clinical Focus",
        case
            when coalesce(o.description, o.code) ilike 'Hemoglobin A1c%' then 'Review diabetic regimen and follow-up interval.'
            when coalesce(o.description, o.code) ilike 'Cholesterol in LDL%' then 'Review statin therapy and adherence.'
            when coalesce(o.description, o.code) ilike 'Glomerular filtration rate%' or coalesce(o.description, o.code) ilike 'Creatinine%' then 'Review renal dosing and kidney disease monitoring.'
            when coalesce(o.description, o.code) ilike 'Glucose%' then 'Assess acute glycemic symptoms and medications.'
            when coalesce(o.description, o.code) ilike 'Hemoglobin%' then 'Consider anemia workup or repeat CBC.'
            when coalesce(o.description, o.code) ilike 'Potassium%' or coalesce(o.description, o.code) ilike 'Sodium%' then 'Assess medication and fluid/electrolyte causes.'
            else 'Review in clinical context.'
        end as "Suggested Follow-up"
    from observations o
    join patients p on p.id = o.patient_id
    where p.golden_id = '${golden_id}'
      and lower(coalesce(o.category, '')) like '%laboratory%'
      and coalesce(o.description, o.code) ~* '(Hemoglobin A1c|Cholesterol in LDL|Creatinine|Glomerular filtration rate|Glucose|Hemoglobin|Potassium|Sodium|Leukocytes|Platelets|Calcium|Carbon dioxide)'
    order by coalesce(o.description, o.code), o.effective_at desc nulls last
)
select * from latest_labs
where "Flag" <> 'Normal'
order by case "Flag" when 'Critical' then 0 when 'High' then 1 when 'Borderline' then 2 else 3 end, "Collected" desc nulls last, "Lab"
limit 20
)
select * from data
union all
select NULL::date, 'No abnormal labs flagged', NULL, 'Normal', NULL, NULL
where not exists (select 1 from data);

with data as (
with ranked_vitals as (
    select distinct on (coalesce(o.description, o.code))
        coalesce(o.description, o.code) as "Vital",
        coalesce(nullif(o.value_text, ''), trim(concat(coalesce(o.value_numeric::text, ''), ' ', coalesce(o.value_unit, '')))) as "Latest Value",
        case
            when coalesce(o.description, o.code) = 'Systolic Blood Pressure' and coalesce(o.value_numeric, 0) >= 140 then 'High'
            when coalesce(o.description, o.code) = 'Diastolic Blood Pressure' and coalesce(o.value_numeric, 0) >= 90 then 'High'
            when coalesce(o.description, o.code) = 'Body mass index (BMI) [Ratio]' and coalesce(o.value_numeric, 0) >= 30 then 'High'
            when coalesce(o.description, o.code) = 'Heart rate' and (coalesce(o.value_numeric, 0) >= 100 or coalesce(o.value_numeric, 999) < 50) then 'High'
            when coalesce(o.description, o.code) = 'Body temperature' and coalesce(o.value_numeric, 0) >= 38 then 'High'
            else 'Normal'
        end as "Flag",
        case
            when coalesce(o.description, o.code) in ('Systolic Blood Pressure', 'Diastolic Blood Pressure') then 'Assess trend and treatment response.'
            when coalesce(o.description, o.code) = 'Body mass index (BMI) [Ratio]' then 'Use with nutrition and activity counseling.'
            when coalesce(o.description, o.code) = 'Heart rate' then 'Review symptoms, rhythm, and medications if persistent.'
            when coalesce(o.description, o.code) = 'Body temperature' then 'Correlate with infection symptoms.'
            else 'Monitor in clinical context.'
        end as "Clinical Note",
        o.effective_at::date as "Recorded"
    from observations o
    join patients p on p.id = o.patient_id
    where p.golden_id = '${golden_id}'
      and lower(coalesce(o.category, '')) like '%vital%'
      and coalesce(o.description, o.code) in (
        'Systolic Blood Pressure',
        'Diastolic Blood Pressure',
        'Body mass index (BMI) [Ratio]',
        'Heart rate',
        'Respiratory rate',
        'Body temperature',
        'Body Weight'
      )
    order by coalesce(o.description, o.code), o.effective_at desc nulls last
)
select * from ranked_vitals
order by
    case "Vital"
        when 'Systolic Blood Pressure' then 0
        when 'Diastolic Blood Pressure' then 1
        when 'Heart rate' then 2
        when 'Body mass index (BMI) [Ratio]' then 3
        when 'Body Weight' then 4
        when 'Respiratory rate' then 5
        when 'Body temperature' then 6
        else 7
    end,
    "Recorded" desc nulls last
)
select * from data
union all
select 'No vitals recorded', NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL::date
where not exists (select 1 from data);

with data as (
select recorded_date::date as "Recorded", allergy as "Allergy", reaction as "Reaction", reaction_severity as "Reaction Severity", criticality as "Criticality", safety_note as "Safety Note"
from provider_allergy_details
where golden_id = '${golden_id}'
order by case reaction_severity when 'Severe' then 0 when 'Moderate' then 1 when 'Mild' then 2 else 3 end, recorded_date desc nulls last, allergy
limit 12
)
select * from data
union all
select NULL::date, 'No active allergies recorded', NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL
where not exists (select 1 from data);

with data as (
select start_date::date as "Date", care_setting as "Care Setting", encounter_type as "Encounter", provider as "Provider", cost as "Cost"
from provider_acute_care_events
where golden_id = '${golden_id}'
  and is_acute
order by start_date desc nulls last
limit 15
)
select * from data
union all
select NULL::date, 'No recent acute care recorded', NULL, NULL, NULL::numeric
where not exists (select 1 from data);

list.description: Paste a golden_id from the provider search or patient directory.
list.label: Golden ID
list.name: golden_id
